_comment: Luke's actual ISU enrollment data, normalized to match the spec'd Student / StudentCourse / StudentDegreeFlow format (system spec §4 Tier 3). Source: registrar dumps in Schedule_2026_Spring.json + Schedule_2026_Fall.json (raw section/scheduling data discarded — only the fields the spec models are kept). All grades null because nothing is completed yet.

courses._validationNote: MATH-1430 (Pre-Calc) is referenced in some catalog prereqs but does not have its own entry in isu-catalog.json yet — needs adding.
Source row read 'Cons Issues' / sectionId 'CONS ISSUES' — not a real ISU course code. Probably a Gen-Ed placeholder; needs the actual classId before it can validate against the catalog.
PHIL-1010 not yet in isu-catalog.json — needs adding (would be a GenEd-eligible course).
